name: dojo-cli
description: Agent workspace CLI for managing multi-repo workspaces, dev session lifecycle, and AI agent context

scripts.build: tsc && rm -rf dist/src/templates dist/src/starter dist/src/builtins dist/src/skills && cp -r src/starter dist/src/starter && cp -r src/builtins dist/src/builtins && cp -r src/skills dist/src/skills
scripts.smoke:tty: npm run smoke:tty:main && npm run smoke:tty:multi && npm run smoke:tty:failures
